classifications.phrase: cumulative increase in interest rates of 3½ percentage points since May last year
full effect of this substantial increase in interest rates is yet to be felt
central forecast is for inflation to decline this year and next, to around 3 per…
growth over the next couple of years expected to be below trend
Board remains alert to the risk of a prices-wages spiral
some further tightening of monetary policy may well be needed to ensure that inflation returns…
Board remains resolute in its determination to return inflation to target

payload.rationale: The statement signals a hawkish medium-term stance on inflation control despite a dovish near-term hold, with acknowledgment of growth and employment softening but emphasis on the need for potential further tightening to combat inflation risks.
